title: Vanilla PvP pack
description: vanilla-style pack with dagger swords, updated TNT, ore borders, smaller fire and totems, plus Vanilla Tweaks improvements for clean visuals and smoother PvP gameplay.
body:
Vanilla PvP - Resource Pack

A clean, vanilla-style resource pack focused on improved visuals and competitive PvP clarity.

Changes included:

- All swords retextured as daggers
- New TNT texture
- Bordered ore textures for better visibility
- New netherite armor texture
- Smaller fire, totem, and food textures
- Small totem pop animation

Vanilla Tweaks additions:

- Dark GUI
- Circular sun and moon
- Quieter explosions and rain
- Alternate bedrock
- Vanilla-style consistency fixes

Full list of Vanilla Tweaks changes: vanillatweaks.net
